assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Frontmatter contains 'name: nextjs-cdk-deploy' and 'description: Deploy Next.js applications to AWS using CDK...' between --- delimiters on lines 1-4

assertion_results.text: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning Next.js and deployment
assertion_results.evidence: Description contains literal 'Use when' on line 3: '...Use when deploying Next.js to AWS, setting up CDK infrastructure for Next.js, creating staging-to-production deployment pipelines...'

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a multi-step numbered deployment workflow with at least 5 steps
assertion_results.evidence: Workflow contains 8 numbered steps: '### 1. Validate prerequisites', '### 2. Configure environment', '### 3. Build the Next.js application', '### 4. Synthesize the CDK stack', '### 5. Deploy to staging', '### 6. Manual approval gate', '### 7. Deploy to production', '### 8. Post-deployment verification'

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments with environment-specific configuration
assertion_results.evidence: Extensive staging/production coverage: config files per environment (lines 49-56), environment config structure with staging.ts example (lines 60-76), comparison table of staging vs production settings (lines 80-87), separate deploy commands for each environment (lines 131-178)

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures with at least 3 specific strategies
assertion_results.evidence: Three distinct rollback strategies in '## Rollback Procedures': 1) 'Immediate rollback (CloudFront)' (lines 198-211) — S3 origin switch, 2) 'CDK rollback (full stack)' (lines 213-229) — CloudFormation stack rollback, 3) 'Emergency rollback (DNS failover)' (lines 231-241) — Route53 DNS switch to maintenance page. Plus a decision tree on lines 245-249.

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with at least 2 deployment-related .ts scripts
assertion_results.evidence: scripts/ directory contains 2 TypeScript files: preflight-check.ts (282 lines) and verify-deployment.ts (422 lines)

assertion_results.text: The scripts use Bun TypeScript (.ts files) with --help flag support
assertion_results.evidence: Both scripts are .ts files with Bun shebangs. preflight-check.ts checks --help on line 176: 'if (args.includes("--help") || args.includes("-h"))'. verify-deployment.ts checks --help on line 351: 'if (args.includes("--help") || args.includes("-h"))'

assertion_results.text: Scripts output structured JSON to stdout
assertion_results.evidence: Both scripts use JSON.stringify: preflight-check.ts line 278: 'console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2))' outputting PreflightResult. verify-deployment.ts line 418: 'console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2))' outputting VerifyResult.

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases with assertions
assertion_results.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1-3), each containing an assertions array: test 1 has 8 assertions, test 2 has 5 assertions, test 3 has 5 assertions

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes table with at least 5 entries
assertion_results.evidence: Section '## Common mistakes' (lines 282-293) contains a table with 8 entries: missing standalone output, require-approval never for prod, hardcoded env values, CloudFront cache invalidation, skipping staging, CDK version mismatch, NEXT_PUBLIC env vars, and Lambda@Edge size limit

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertion_results.evidence: SKILL.md is 325 lines, under the 500-line limit

assertion_results.text: The skill includes a manual approval gate before production deployment
assertion_results.evidence: Section '### 6. Manual approval gate' (lines 150-166) explicitly states 'Do NOT deploy to production without explicit approval', shows a verification summary template, and instructs 'Wait for explicit user approval before proceeding. Never auto-promote to production.'

assertion_results.text: The skill includes a references/ directory with CDK stack patterns
The name field matches the directory name 'nextjs-cdk-deploy'
assertion_results.evidence: YAML frontmatter name field is 'nextjs-cdk-deploy' on line 2, matching the output directory name 'nextjs-cdk-deploy'
